mapper.select: SELECT t.id AS templateId, c.id AS customId, #{groupId} AS groupId, t.category, t.charge_name AS chargeName, t.sample_type AS sampleType, t.project, COALESCE(c.plasmid_length_min, t.plasmid_length_min) AS plasmidLengthMin, COALESCE(c.plasmid_length_max, t.plasmid_length_max) AS plasmidLengthMax, COALESCE(c.fragment_size_min, t.fragment_size_min) AS fragmentSizeMin, COALESCE(c.fragment_size_max, t.fragment_size_max) AS fragmentSizeMax, COALESCE(c.unit_price, t.unit_price, up.unit_price) AS unitPrice, COALESCE(c.calc_method, t.calc_method) AS calcMethod, COALESCE(c.status, t.status) AS status, CASE WHEN c.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isCustom, COALESCE(c.create_by, t.create_by) AS createBy, COALESCE(c.create_time, t.create_time) AS createTime, COALESCE(c.update_by, t.update_by) AS updateBy, COALESCE(c.update_time, t.update_time) AS updateTime, COALESCE(c.remark, t.remark) AS remark FROM yk_price_config t LEFT JOIN yk_price_config c ON c.group_id = #{groupId} AND c.sample_type = t.sample_type AND c.project = t.project AND c.plasmid_length_min = t.plasmid_length_min AND c.plasmid_length_max = t.plasmid_length_max AND c.fragment_size_min = t.fragment_size_min AND c.fragment_size_max = t.fragment_size_max AND c.status = 1 LEFT JOIN yk_unit_price up ON up.group_id = #{groupId} WHERE t.group_id IS NULL AND t.status = 1 ORDER BY t.category, t.sample_type, t.project, t.plasmid_length_min, t.fragment_size_min
